Metrics for Data Management Campus

2026-05-05

A) OpenLearnity

Direct measures:

  • user_id: user identifier.
  • module_title: module title.
  • last_login: date of last login in the module. This variable overwrites each time the same user logs in.

Derived variables:

  • logged_users: number of logged users per module during a specific period of time.
    Calculated as count of unique users per module.

  • logged_users_week: number of unique users per week for each module.
    Calculated as count of unique users grouped by week (from last_login) and module.

Figure 1. Number of logged-in users per week for each module in OpenLearnity

Selected time period: Jan 2026 up to now.

B) Matomo for OpenLearnity

Direct measures:
Data from Page Titles.

  • module_title: module title.
  • unique_pageviews: unique page views of the module’s “About” page (counted once per session).
  • entrances: number of sessions that start on this page.
  • actions_after_entry: number of interactions (e.g., clicks, downloads, pageviews) performed after the session starts on this page.

Derived variables:

  • engagement_per_entrance: average number of user interactions generated after sessions start on the “About” page of a module.
    Calculated as actions_after_entry / entrances.
Figure 2. User behaviour from Open Learnity and Matomo

Selected time period: Jan-Mar 2026.

C) Google Analytics for ORD Portal

Direct measures:

  • page_title: page title.
  • views: total number of page views. A proxy of intensity of use per page.
  • active_users: number of users who engaged with the page (i.e., session lasted 10 seconds or longer). A proxy of reach per page.
Figure 3. Page views and active users for the ORD pages in Google Analytics

Selected time period: Jan-Mar 2026.

D) Zenodo OER

Direct measures:

  • record_id: zenodo resource identifier.
  • resource_title: resource title.
  • resource_type: lesson, presentation, video_audio.
  • views: number of times resource was viewed.
  • downloads: number of times resource was downloaded.
Figure 4. Total engagement by resource type and module in Zenodo

Full record (no temporal filtering).

Figure 5. Number of views and downloads by resource type and module in Zenodo

Full record (no temporal filtering).
